reviews.comment:
Malisimo su servicio soy socio del ACA y no me dan lugar a su mugroso estacionamiento por 3 dias asi que el mes que me viene me voy a desafiliar de socio. Gracias por la cortesia

Your service is terrible. I'm an ACA member, and they won't let me into their filthy parking lot for three days, so I'm canceling my membership next month. Thank you for your courtesy.
